---
title: 'Friedewald: Discordant predictions related to bias in cardiology outpatient population'
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
date: "Report generated on: `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, comment = NA)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
set.seed(seed = 200)
```

## Import functions and variables.
```{r, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
source('src/variables_friedewald.R', local = variables <- new.env())
source('src/predict_friedewald.R', local = friedewald <- new.env())
```

## Set simulation parameters.
```{r}
parameters <- new.env()
parameters$data <- read.csv('data/test_data.csv')
parameters$identifier <- "id"
parameters$continuous_prediction_function <- friedewald$get_continuous_prediction_ldl
parameters$ordinal_prediction_function <- friedewald$get_ordinal_prediction_ldl
parameters$categorical_prediction_function <- friedewald$get_categorical_prediction_ldl
parameters$model <- NA
parameters$model_variables <- variables$selected_variables_friedewald
parameters$uncertain_variables <- variables$selected_variables_friedewald[variables$uncertain_variables_indicator_friedewald]
parameters$laboratory <- "lab"
```

## Set bias data parameters.
```{r}
parameters$bias_data <- read.csv('data/paba_data.csv')
parameters$ref_ptp <- NA
parameters$bias_data_names <- c(
  "cholesterol" = "Cholesterol",
  "hdl" = "HDL-Cholesterol",
  "triglycerides" = "Triglyceriden"
)
```

## Set bootstrap parameters.
```{r}
parameters$bootstrap_number_of_samples <- 1000
parameters$bootstrap_confidence_level <- 0.95
parameters$bootstrap_methods <- c("perc") # c("norm", "bca")
```

## Set plot parameters.
```{r}
parameters$histogram_method <- "laboratory"
parameters$histogram_method_label <- "Laboratory"
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_prediction_binwidth <- 0.5
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_prediction_x_range <- c(-20, 20)
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_prediction_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_difference_binwidth <- 0.5
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_difference_x_range <- c(-5, 5)
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_difference_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_percentage_difference_binwidth <- 0.5
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_percentage_difference_x_range <- c(-20, 20)
parameters$histogram_continuous_median_percentage_difference_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_continuous_mae_binwidth <- 0.5
parameters$histogram_continuous_mae_x_range <- c(0, 5)
parameters$histogram_continuous_mae_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_continuous_rmse_binwidth <- 0.5
parameters$histogram_continuous_rmse_x_range <- c(0, 5)
parameters$histogram_continuous_rmse_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_median_difference_binwidth <- 0.5
parameters$histogram_ordinal_median_difference_x_range <- c(0, 5)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_median_difference_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_mae_binwidth <- 0.5
parameters$histogram_ordinal_mae_x_range <- c(0, 5)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_mae_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_micro_rmse_binwidth <- 0.5
parameters$histogram_ordinal_micro_rmse_x_range <- c(0, 50)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_micro_rmse_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_macro_rmse_binwidth <- 0.5
parameters$histogram_ordinal_macro_rmse_x_range <- c(0, 5)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_macro_rmse_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_percentage_discordant_binwidth <- 0.5
parameters$histogram_ordinal_percentage_discordant_x_range <- c(0, 100)
parameters$histogram_ordinal_percentage_discordant_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_dichotomous_percentage_discordant_binwidth <- 0.5
parameters$histogram_dichotomous_percentage_discordant_x_range <- c(0, 20)
parameters$histogram_dichotomous_percentage_discordant_y_range <- c(0, 10)
```

## Set parameters to save results.
```{r}
parameters$model_name <- 'friedewald'
parameters$population <- 'cardio'
parameters$path_output <- 'out/friedewald/simulations_discordance/'
```

```{r, child='markdown/template_discordance.Rmd'}

```
